articles.description: Thomas Tuchel's doubts about Trent Alexander-Arnold and reliance on Harry Kane are confirmed on the England manager's Madrid mission.
articles.title: Thomas Tuchel assesses Trent Alexander-Arnold and Harry Kane

articles.description: David Raya is the best goalkeeper in the world, according to his Arsenal team-mates - and the Spaniard played a key role in his side's 1-0 win at Sporting.
articles.title: Sporting 0-1 Arsenal: Is David Raya the best goalkeeper in the world?

articles.description: Twelve months after the greatest moment of his career, Rory McIlroy returns to the Masters looking for a rare back-to-back win.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Can Rory McIlroy create more Augusta history by winning back-to-back Green Jackets

articles.description: Gary Woodland says he has "no idea" when he may suffer a PTSD episode but knowing security is close at hand at the Masters helps keep him calm.
articles.title: The Masters 2026: Gary Woodland on dealing with PTSD at Augusta

articles.description: Legendary manager Mircea Lucescu dies aged 80, five days after stepping down as Romania's head coach.
articles.title: Mircea Lucescu: Legendary manager dies after stepping down as coach

articles.description: Arne Slot says Liverpool have no chance against Paris St-Germain unless his side turns up for 90 minutes - after disagreeing with Virgil Van Dijk's comments about the team giving up.
articles.title: PSG v Liverpool: 'We've become quite experienced in negativity' - under-pressure Slot denies Liverpool 'gave up'...

articles.description: England and Scotland fans hoping to get to ticket to this summer's World Cup finals face paying vastly inflated prices through Fifa's official resale platform.
articles.title: England and Scotland World Cup tickets on resale at inflated prices

articles.description: Manchester United winger Amad Diallo backs interim boss Michael Carrick to become the club's permanent manager.
articles.title: Michael Carrick backed for Man Utd job by winger Amad Diallo

articles.description: Find out the tee-times for Thursday and Friday's first two rounds of the Masters at Augusta National in Georgia.
articles.title: The Masters 2026 tee-times: McIlroy, Rahm, Scheffler, DeChambeau & Fleetwood at Augusta

articles.description: The Premier League will have at least five teams in the Champions League next season after securing a European Performance Spot for the second straight year.
articles.title: Premier League secures fifth Champions League spot
